Chicago editing work

Video Editor Jobs in Chicago

Chicago video editing work spans agencies, brands, education, nonprofits, events, podcasts, creator channels, and production teams that may need local or hybrid collaboration.

Chicago is a practical early local page because local hiring intent shows up alongside remote and freelance demand.

Join editor alerts Post a role

Local role patterns

Chicago editor roles often involve agency campaigns, corporate video, nonprofit storytelling, education content, event recaps, social video, podcasts, and producer-editor workflows.

What local employers should include

A useful Chicago listing should clarify whether the editor must be local, how often in-person collaboration happens, expected pay range, software stack, and whether shoot support is part of the role.

Role examples

Editing work this page routes toward

Remote

Short-form video editor

Reels, TikTok, YouTube Shorts, creator teams

  • fast turnaround
  • caption styling
  • social hooks
Remote or hybrid

YouTube channel editor

Long-form YouTube, podcasts, education, creator-led brands

  • story pacing
  • retention edits
  • thumbnail collaboration
Contract

Brand video editor

B2B, ecommerce, product launches, paid social

  • motion basics
  • ad variants
  • stakeholder review
Entry level

Assistant editor

Post houses, agencies, production teams

  • media management
  • proxy workflows
  • Premiere or Resolve

Answers

Questions editors and hiring teams ask first

Are Chicago video editor jobs usually remote or local?

Both exist. Some Chicago roles are fully remote, while agencies, production teams, event groups, and local brands may prefer hybrid or on-site collaboration.

A focused editor community and hiring intake surface for recurring video work.
